nasb.text: Immediately the news about Him spread everywhere into all the surrounding district of Galilee.

esv.text: And at once his fame spread everywhere throughout all the surrounding region of Galilee.

cnv.text: 耶穌的名聲立刻傳遍了加利利一帶。

ccb.text: 于是，耶稣的名声立刻传遍了整个加利利。

csbs.text: 于是耶稣的消息很快地传遍了加利利周围所有的地区。
